message:
fix(btrfs): correct ROOT_ITEM test fixture offsets for uuid/parent_uuid

build_test_btrfs_root_item was using incorrect offsets (224/240) for
uuid and parent_uuid fields. Corrected to match parse_root_item spec:
- generation_v2 at offset 239 (must equal generation for uuid validity)
- uuid at offset 247
- parent_uuid at offset 263
- Extended root_item size from 256 to 279 bytes

Fixes btrfs snapshot lookup tests that relied on parent_uuid detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
